item.title: Only insane people use the internet 摘要
item.description:
The author describes a recurring experience with a reader who sends a nasty reply to every post within 24 hours. The reader's criticism is framed as a backhanded compliment, acknowledging the author's ability to articulate thoughts well while disagreeing. The article reflects on the nature of online engagement and the persistence of negative feedback, suggesting that only 'insane' people use the internet in such a dedicated, confrontational manner.
标签: online behavior, feedback, writing, internet culture, criticism, engagement, persistence, communication

item.title: Revenge of The Business Idiot 摘要
item.description:
The article criticizes AI adoption in business, arguing that executives and managers, termed 'Business Idiots,' embrace generative AI because it mimics work without understanding real productivity. It claims AI tools like LLMs enable incompetent leaders to bypass skilled workers, produce unrealistic prototypes, and ignore feasibility. The author cites Salesforce marketing non-existent AI features and highlights how AI fosters a culture of mediocrity, where effort and craft are devalued. The piece concludes that AI hype is driven by ignorance and desperation, not genuine innovation.
标签: AI, business, management, critique, generative AI, executives, productivity, hype, Salesforce, workplace culture

item.title: Calculating the expected range of normal samples 摘要
item.description:
This article explains how to compute the expected range of n samples from a standard normal distribution N(0,1). The expected range d_n is given by an integral involving the normal PDF and CDF, which can be computed numerically using Python's scipy library. For n ≤ 5, closed-form solutions exist, but larger n require numerical integration. An asymptotic approximation is provided for large n, which may be more accurate than numerical integration due to integration errors. Example values are given for n from 2 to 100, showing the expected range in units of σ.
标签: statistics, normal distribution, expected range, order statistics, numerical integration, Python, scipy, asymptotic approximation
